seed_rate.notes: Higher seed rate of 125 kg/ha is recommended for late sowing conditions.

sowing.soil_conditions: Fine tilth soil with optimal moisture level to ensure uniform germination.

irrigation.notes: Most critical stage. Water shortage at this stage severely reduces tillering and yield.
Supports rapid vegetative growth and stem elongation.
Ensures proper pollination and prevents spikelet sterility.
Ensures grain size development and weight.
Last light irrigation. Avoid high winds during irrigation to prevent lodging.

fertilizer.method: Soil incorporation during final land preparation
fertilizer.notes: Full dose of Phosphorus and Potassium, along with half the total Nitrogen.
One-fourth of total Nitrogen applied immediately before or after the first irrigation.
Remaining one-fourth of Nitrogen applied at the tillering/jointing transition.

maturity_indicators: Straw and spikes turn golden yellow
Grains become hard and make a cracking sound when pressed between teeth
Moisture level in grain drops below 15%
harvest.harvest_method: Sickle manual harvesting or mechanical combine harvester
harvest.notes: Store in dry place after sun drying to 12% moisture to prevent pest infestation.
